securityAccessPage.title: Security & access
securityAccessPage.description: Manage your active sessions, passkeys, API keys and authorized applications.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.revokeAllDescription: This will log you out of all devices except this one. Are you sure?

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.emptyDescription: Passkeys let you sign in without a password using biometrics or a hardware key.

apiKeys.title: Personal API keys
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create an API key to access the Linear API programmatically.
apiKeys.dialogDescription: Give your API key a name to identify it later.

authorizedApps.title: Authorized applications
authorizedApps.emptyDescription: Applications you authorize via OAuth will appear here.
